name: paw-terminal
description: A modern terminal emulator with vim-like copy mode
author: Bing Tong

scripts.dev: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && node scripts/dev.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dist: node scripts/check-native-modules.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --publish=never
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/check-native-modules.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish=never
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/check-native-modules.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --win --publish=never
scripts.dist:linux: node scripts/check-native-modules.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --publish=never
scripts.dist:all: node scripts/check-native-modules.mjs && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --win --linux --publish=never
